targets.rawSql: SELECT agent_name, precision_rate FROM agent_precision_profiles WHERE repository = '$repository' AND learning_version = (SELECT MAX(learning_version) FROM agent_precision_profiles WHERE repository = '$repository')

SELECT agent_name, accepted_findings, dismissed_findings FROM agent_precision_profiles WHERE repository = '$repository' AND learning_version = (SELECT MAX(learning_version) FROM agent_precision_profiles WHERE repository = '$repository')
SELECT computed_at AS time, agent_name AS metric, precision_rate AS value FROM agent_precision_profiles WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY computed_at
